title: How can I help with reading at home?
body: My daughter Lily is doing well in maths but I want to support her reading. What books are good for Year 3?

replies.body: Great question! For Year 3, try the Treehouse series by Andy Griffiths — very popular with the class. Reading 10-15 minutes each night makes a big difference.
We love the Treehouse books too! Tom reads them on his own now. Also try Roald Dahl.

title: ما هو NAPLAN وكيف أحضر طفلي؟
body: أنا جديدة في النظام المدرسي الأسترالي. هل يمكن لأحد أن يشرح ما هو NAPLAN وهل يحتاج أمير للتحضير؟

replies.body: NAPLAN is a national assessment in Years 3, 5, 7 and 9. It tests reading, writing, spelling, grammar and numeracy. No special preparation is needed — just keep doing regular homework and reading. Amir is doing great!

title: After-school maths activities?
body: Tom struggles a bit with his times tables. Does anyone have recommendations for fun maths games or apps?
